channel.title: YT Digest Podcast
channel.description: Auto-generated weekly podcast from YouTube subscription transcripts via NotebookLM
channel.itunes:author: YT Digest Pipeline
channel.itunes:summary: Auto-generated weekly podcast from YouTube subscription transcripts via NotebookLM

item.title: 8ffc0e22 — 7232 — 4984 — b5cd — 2c15b1c1c9e5 audio
item.description:
YT Digest for 8ffc0e22 — 7232 — 4984 — b5cd — 2c15b1c1c9e5 audio
Videos covered in this episode:
- Greg Isenberg: Hermes Agent: The New OpenClaw? (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qn2c_U-cWQs) - AI Jason: Okay, this unleashed my agent (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2zhchG0r6iI) - AI Code King: Qwen 3.6 27B + Hermes,OpenCode,OpenClaw: THIS IS SO GOOD! The BEST LOCAL AI CODER! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SjBBUB1njBc) - AI Code King: OpenClaw SUPER MODE: OpenClaw just got 2X BETTER with this MODE!! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zPzFKigN7lY) - Cole Medin: Pi Coding Agent + Archon: Build ANY AI Coding Workflow (No Claude Code Bloat) (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XSmI7OYd7iM) - Build Great Products: How to Build ACTUALLY Beautiful Websites With Claude Design & Claude Code (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8GXvgxKPATk)
